             weight=self.weights,

             label_smoothing=self.label_smoothing,

         )

+

+

+class LDAMLoss(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, class_counts, max_m=0.5, s=30.0):

+        super().__init__()

+        counts = torch.tensor(class_counts, dtype=torch.float32)

+        m_list = 1.0 / torch.sqrt(torch.sqrt(counts))

+        m_list = m_list * (max_m / m_list.max())

+        self.register_buffer("m_list", m_list)

+        self.s = s

+

+    def forward(self, logits, targets):

+        margins = self.m_list[targets]

+        adjusted = logits.clone()

+        adjusted[torch.arange(logits.size(0), device=logits.device), targets] -= margins

+        return nn.functional.cross_entropy(self.s * adjusted, targets)

 

 

 def make_transforms(img_size=224):

@@ -121,120 +137,171 @@
         if epoch < args.drw_start_epoch:

             return nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=args.label_smoothing)

         return ClassBalancedCELoss(class_counts, beta=args.cb_beta, label_smoothing=args.label_smoothing)

+    if args.loss_name == "ldam":

+        return LDAMLoss(class_counts, max_m=args.ldam_max_m, s=args.ldam_s)

     return nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=args.label_smoothing)

+

+

+def set_trainable(model, train_backbone=True):

+    for p in model.parameters():

+        p.requires_grad = True

+    if not train_backbone:

+        for p in model.backbone.parameters():

+            p.requires_grad = False

+        head = model.backbone.get_classifier()

+        for p in head.parameters():

+            p.requires_grad = True

+

+

+def get_param_groups(model, lr, weight_decay, head_lr_mult=1.0, train_backbone=True):

+    if train_backbone:

+        return [

+            {"params": [p for p in model.parameters() if p.requires_grad], "lr": lr, "weight_decay": weight_decay}

+        ]

+    head = model.backbone.get_classifier()

+    return [

+        {"params": [p for p in head.parameters() if p.requires_grad], "lr": lr * head_lr_mult, "weight_decay": weight_decay}

+    ]
